content.en:
"These Holy Sons of the Upper Spirit Origin Domain are too weak! Master Venerable also asked me to be careful, hehe, a group of ants, can only be assigned to me to collect resources!"

After killing a holy son casually, Chenguang Yuan Ancestor mocked.

He had comprehended one hundred and twenty-three extreme paths, and had also condensed two hundred and eighty-six layers of the Will Pagoda, as well as a genius who had created a consummation-level primordial mastery technique.

He was going to use the resources he had obtained in the Supreme Treasure Land this time to raise the Pagoda of Will to the thirty-sixth and fifteenth floor, and then break through to become a Quadruple Ancestor.

As for inscribed the three hundred and sixty-five layers of the Will Pagoda on the Extreme Path, he didn't have this idea, it was unrealistic!

It was already very difficult for him to comprehend one hundred and twenty-three extreme extreme paths, and it would take an infinite number of years to comprehend another extreme extreme path.

As a result, he gave up on the ultimate path of enlightenment.

After going out of the Supreme Treasure Land this time, he was ready to break through and become a Quadruple Ancestor.

Moreover, with his harvest this time, with the cultivation resources in the future, the cultivation speed will definitely be very fast.

"Hey, another holy son!"

Chenguang Origin Ancestor sensed the aura of a Triple Origin Ancestor and muttered.

But suddenly, he trembled and felt the danger of death.

Swish!

The Triple Ancestor had leapt forward faster than he had ever imagined.

Then he saw a golden light penetrate his body.

In an instant, his Primordial Ancestor's body was shattered, and he didn't have the life-saving ability of the Nine Primordial Ancestors, after all, he was just a clone.

So, he was killed in one hit.

And the person who made the shot was Ye Tian.

"How powerful do you think, but that's it?"

Ye Tian was surprised, this is easier than killing the Nine Ancestors!

But it's right to think about it, the Nine Ancestors are the main body after all, and they have specially cultivated a lot of life-preserving secret techniques, and the Nine Lights Holy Gate has also given him a lot of life-preserving things.

And this mysterious Triple Ancestor is just a clone of the will, naturally he has no life-saving ability, but his attack power is a little more powerful than that of the Nine Ancestors.

Therefore, it is naturally much easier to kill him than to kill Jiuzun.

"This guy has robbed so many treasures!"

Ye Tian was shocked.

How many Triple Ancestors have been killed like this, I'm afraid that even those true disciples have been hunted down by him.

"More than 300 drops of Taishi Golden Liquid, plus I have killed a lot of Holy Sons and True Disciples during this time, now I have gathered the Taishi Golden Liquid needed for the fourth Natal Primordial Control Technique!"

Ye Tian said excitedly.

If you continue to search, you may be able to gather the Taishi Golden Liquid needed for the Fifth Natal Primordial Mastery Technique before leaving.

In addition to the Taishi Golden Liquid, the resources on Chenguang's original ancestor were also terrifying, which directly caused Ye Tian's value to skyrocket.

"Yes, this time it was a big gain!"

Ye Tian said with satisfaction.

......

Somewhere in the primordial Black Sea.

"Damn, I was killed, my treasure!!!"

Chenguang Yuan Ancestor was furious.

He couldn't wait to go to Shizun to help him take revenge, but after thinking about it carefully, he still forgot it, because Shizun would definitely be unwilling, and even make Shizun unhappy.

"I will take revenge in the future!"

Chenguang Ancestor said coldly.

Subsequently, he went to find Shizun, he wanted to ask for a little Taishi Golden Liquid, otherwise he wouldn't even be able to condense the second Natal Primordial Control Technique.

The years passed.

After a long time, the resources of this supreme treasure land were almost all scraped, and it was almost the time agreed by the Fivefold Holy Gate.

Thereupon.

They let go of the restrictions and let these Triple Ancestors come out of the Supreme Treasure Land, and then they were taken away by their respective Fivefold Ancestors.

And this time, the Fengming Origin Ancestor and many of the Fivefold Origin Ancestors of the Void Tooth Holy Gate all came here.

Even, the only half-step sixfold ancestor of the Void Tooth Holy Gate, the Void Tooth Holy Ancestor, also came.

"What, the Void Tooth Holy Ancestor actually came in person!"

The Fivefold Ancestors were amazed.

But soon, they knew why.

It must be that he was worried that the Fifth Ancestor would not follow the rules, so he would make a move on Ye Tian.

After all, Ye Tian had killed too many Holy Sons and True Disciples this time, and the resources on his body were so terrifying, they were worth more than some of the Fifth Ancestral Ancestors.

Maybe the half-step sixfold primordial ancestor didn't care about these resources, but if Ye Tian obtained these resources, his growth rate would be faster, and he could also solidify several natal primordial control techniques, and it would be almost a hundred percent thing to become a fivefold primordial ancestor in the future.

So, the Void Tooth Holy Ancestor is here.

......

"It's finally out!"

Ye Tian came out of the supreme treasure land, and was moved by Feng Ming's original ancestor for the first time.

At this time, Ye Tianming sensed the gaze of a fivefold ancestor staring at him, as if he was about to tear him apart, which made him tremble.

After all, compared to his current strength and the Fivefold Ancestor, the gap is really too big!

"Endless Ancestor, this is the Sect Master, the Void Tooth Holy Ancestor!"

Feng Ming's original ancestor introduced.

"I've seen the master!"

Ye Tian said respectfully.

He naturally knew that this sect master was the founder of the Void Tooth Holy Gate, and he was also the only half-step sixfold ancestor of the Void Tooth Holy Gate, and he was not weak among the half-step sixfold ancestors, otherwise he would not be able to create a five-fold holy gate and compete with the other five five-fold holy gates.

These characters are all working hard to impact the Sixfold Ancestor, and they don't care about many things.

Unexpectedly, he came here today, as if to protect him.

"Let's go back!"

The Void Tooth Holy Ancestor said lightly.

"Yes!"

Many fivefold ancestors responded to the Tao.

Immediately, Ye Tian followed many of the Fivefold Ancestors back to the Void Tooth Holy Gate.

After returning to the Void Fang Holy Gate, he was truly relieved.

Only now did these treasures on his body truly belong to him.

Temple of False Teeth.

A group of holy sons and true disciples came here.

However, the Void Tooth Holy Gate only survived thirteen Holy Sons and six True Disciple disciples this time, and all the other doppelgangers fell.

"Take out the treasures from the list you have obtained!"

Feng Ming Yuan Ancestor said.

Immediately, one by one, the Holy Son and the True Transmission disciples took out their harvest.

Some only received a few treasures on the list, while others received dozens, varying in quantity.

Finally it was Ye Tian's turn.

And the other Holy Sons were also very curious about how many treasures Ye Tian had found on the list that were valuable to the Fivefold Ancestors.

Crash!

One treasure after another was taken out by Ye Tian.

Ten pieces!

100 pieces!

A thousand pieces!

......

"Five thousand three hundred treasures!"

Feng Ming Yuan Ancestor took a deep breath and said.

These are all treasures that are valuable to the Fivefold Ancestor of her level, but Ye Tian has obtained five thousand three hundred, this must not be found, most of them should have killed other Holy Sons and True Disciples, thus obtaining so many treasures.

At this time, Feng Ming Origin Ancestor said: "Endless Origin Ancestor, you have found so many treasures, which can be calculated as contribution points!"

"Yes!"

Ye Tian agreed.

Calculated as a contribution value, although it may not give the original value, at least it will not be given to the Void Tooth Holy Gate in vain.

These contribution points can be used to buy the treasures you need, as well as enter some rare cultivation treasures, and exchange them for various items, in short, the value is too high.

Subsequently, Ye Tian returned to his residence and began to sort out the harvest this time.
